creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
I just took over the unmaintained x11-wm/wmanager port with the aim to
apply some patches and synchronize it with some of the recent changes
that I made to the Debian wmanager package.

However, a FreeBSD-port-specific fix includes moving the pkg-message file
to the files/ directory and renaming it to "pkg-message.in".  Even though
the history for this file is not especially telling, it would make sense to
at least record my modification to the file (removing a hard-coded path)
as a CVS delta, so IMHO a repo-copy is in order.

Fix: 

Repo-copy ports/x11-wm/wmanager/pkg-message to
ports/x11-wm/wmanager/files/pkg-message.in
How-To-Repeat: N/A
